name: Interaction Dynamics Modeling and Predictive Control for Safe Steerable Catheter--Tissue Interaction
summary: arXiv:2607.20939v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safe steerable catheter control is fundamentally a problem of interaction dynamics: the tip must follow a planned motion, remain compliant against...
description: arXiv:2607.20939v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safe steerable catheter control is fundamentally a problem of interaction dynamics: the tip must follow a planned motion, remain compliant against moving tissue, reject friction and hysteresis, and respect a clinically meaningful never-exceed contact-force bound. We formulate catheter--tissue interaction dynamics in the scalar tip-normal coordin...
author: Yongyan Cao
